message:
docs(raptorq+time): gf256 command_bundle field docs + interval deadline comment

gf256: adds doc comments explaining that the DualKernelPolicySnapshot
command_bundle field intentionally anchors to the broader
gf256_primitives benchmark surface, while probe-specific validation
uses a separate gf256_dual_policy repro command from the Criterion
harness. Also adds two test assertions verifying the bundle contains
the expected benchmark target and does not contain the probe target.

interval: adds comments explaining why periods_to_skip gets +1 — the
new deadline must be strictly greater than now, since elapsed = now -
deadline means deadline + periods_to_skip * period_nanos <= now.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
